heading: Pellaring Flat vs Penfield Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pellaring Flat, South Australia and Penfield Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Penfield Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pellaring Flat (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pellaring Flat or Penfield Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pellaring Flat has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Penfield Gardens scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pellaring Flat scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Penfield Gardens scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pellaring Flat or Penfield Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Penfield Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
